subject: Norlan Guzman-Fuentes
summary: Norlan Guzman-Fuentes, 37, of El Salvador, was shot and killed on September 24, 2025 by anti-ICE activist Joshua Jahn who attacked ICE detainees at Dallas field office. Two other detainees also shot; one died later. Victims were restrained in van and unable to escape. CRITICAL: This was NOT an ICE agent shooting - activist killed the people he claimed to protect.

key_facts.investigation_status: FBI investigating as attack on federal facility
